content.text: Rewrite the body of normalize_scores() to clamp then rescale instead of the old min-max.

content.content:
def normalize_scores(raw):
    total = sum(raw)
    if total == 0:
        return [0.0 for _ in raw]
    lo = min(raw)
    hi = max(raw)
    span = hi - lo
    out = [(x - lo) / span for x in raw]
    return out
